rounds: Two weeks of showing up in the same kit, same routine — the Joy Police didn't get to disrupt anything, which is actually a win for consistency. But the Apollo ring moment? They got that one. A colleague literally opened a door and you closed it. The half-naked man on your finger was RIGHT THERE and they still talked you out of it.
pattern: They're letting the body show up but shutting down any conversation about why.
focus: One moment this week where someone notices something gay about you — and you let them.
